chunks.title: Remember the Wilderness Journey
chunks.reason: Moses exhorts Israel to remember God's discipline and testing in the wilderness as a model for their current obedience.

chunks.title: Description of the Promised Land
chunks.reason: A descriptive passage detailing the abundance of the land and the command to bless God upon entering it.

chunks.title: Warning Against Pride in Wealth
chunks.reason: An argument warning that prosperity may lead to forgetting God and attributing wealth to one's own power.

chunks.title: Consequence of Idolatry
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle declaring that forgetting God and serving other gods will result in perishing like the nations before them.
